attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
                  -999 as ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
                  COALESCE(NSQL.SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,-999) AS DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
                  ST.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
                  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
                  NPA.ITEM_KEY AS ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
            COALESCE(NPB.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
                  COALESCE(NSQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
                  COALESCE(ST.START_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT, 
                  COALESCE(ST.END_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
                  COALESCE(NPC.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
                  COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0) AS QUANTITY,
               COALESCE(NULLIF(ST.ATTRIBUTED_PERCENTAGE,0), 0 ) AS ATTR_PCT,
                  COALESCE(ST.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0000) AS ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
                  COALESCE(ST.LINE_EXTENDED_PRICE,0.0000) AS ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
                  COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_SALES_MOTION, 'UNKNOWN' ) SALES_MOTION_CD,
                  COALESCE(SITEUSE.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999 ) AS ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
                  COALESCE(ST.AS_TS_FLAG,'UNK') AS AS_TS_CD,
                  COALESCE( ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER,-999 ) AS SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
                  COALESCE( ARCH.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
                  COALESCE( TECH.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
                  COALESCE( OFFER.NAME,'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                  COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999) AS TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
                  COALESCE(ST.TRX_ID,-999) AS SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
                  COALESCE(NULLIF(ST.AS_PARENT_SKU_INV_ITM_ID,0),-999) AS SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
                  COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
                  COALESCE(ST.TRX_VERSION,-999) AS ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
                  ST.CONTROL_ID AS SK_CONTROL_ID_INT, 
                  ST.LINE_COUNT AS SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
      'RTE' AS SS_CD,
      COALESCE(ST.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999) AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
                  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
      USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
                  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
      USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS START_TV_DTM, 
      '3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS END_TV_DTM, 
      COALESCE(ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS PID_MATCHING_VALUE,
      COALESCE(NPHQ.PARTY_KEY,-999) AS HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
                  ST.RENEWAL_REF_VALUE AS RENEWAL_REF_ID,
                  ST.RENEWAL_REF_TYPE AS RENEWAL_REF_CD,
                  ST.REASON_CODE AS SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
                  'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
      COALESCE(ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG,'N') AS MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,    
      COALESCE(NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,                   
      ST.CASE_NUMBER AS SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,                   
      ST.COMMENTS AS SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
      COALESCE(ST.ATTIBUTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS  ATTIBUTION_CD,
      COALESCE(ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, -999) as BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
      COALESCE(ST.ORDER_ORIGIN, 'UNKNOWN') as ORDER_ORIGIN, 
      ST.ORDER_NUMBER AS DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,   
      'ERP' AS DV_TRX_TYPE,           
      COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0) AS QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
      ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
      ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
      ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	  ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WHERE BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION NOT IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') AND COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') NOT IN ('DISTI-DSV')
  AND COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') NOT IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN ) ) ST 
             INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV WHERE CAST(END_TV_DATETIME AS DATE)='3500-01-01' 
     QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ORDER BY END_TV_DATETIME DESC) = 1)NSOL
              ON ST.ERP_LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
              LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE NSQL
              ON COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') = NSQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM
              AND COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(NSQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_ID_INT,-999)
             LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPC
              ON COALESCE(ST.COVERED_PRD_INV_ITM_ID,-1012624) = NPC.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
             INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPA
              ON ST.ENTERPRISE_SKU_INV_ITM_ID = NPA.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
             LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPB
              ON COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,-1012624) = NPB.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE SITEUSE
              ON CAST(COALESCE(ST.INSTALL_SITE_LOCATION,-999)as BIGINT) = SITEUSE.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
             LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
              ON COALESCE(ST.TXN_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
             AND NP.SS_CODE IN ('CR_MODS','CR')
    AND COALESCE(NP.STATUS_CODE,'A')='A'
              LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPHQ
              ON COALESCE(ST.HQ_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) = NPHQ.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
               AND NPHQ.SS_CODE IN ('CR_MODS','CR')
             AND COALESCE(NPHQ.STATUS_CODE,'A')='A'
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_ARCH ARCH
    ON ST.ARCHITECTURE_ID = ARCH.ARCHITECTURE_ID
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_TECH TECH
    ON ST.TECHNOLOGY_ID = TECH.TECHNOLOGY_ID
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_BIZ_SERVICES OFFER
    ON ST.OFFER_TYPE_ID = OFFER.BS_ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
    ON NCWP.CEC_ID||'@cisco.com'=ST.USER_ID
    AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'

SELECT
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	ST.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.PRODUCT_KEY,
	ST.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	ST.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	ST.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	ST.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.QUANTITY,                      
	ST.ATTR_PCT,
	ST.ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	ST.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	ST.AS_TS_CD,
	ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	ST.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	ST.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	ST.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	ST.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
	ST.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
	ST.SS_CD,
	ST.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	ST.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE ,
	ST.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	ST.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	ST.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	ST.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD, 
	ST.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
	ST.DV_TRX_TYPE,
	ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
	ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
	ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
	'N' AS PROCESS_FLAG ,
	CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(100) ) AS CS_SCENARIO,
	ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING ST 
  WHERE ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ('AS CORE - SW Products', 'AS CORE - HW Products','AS CORE - Special')
  AND COALESCE(ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') <> 'DISTI-DSV'
  AND COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') NOT IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN )

SELECT 
RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
,TRX_ID                        
,TRX_VERSION                   
,ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,ATTRIBUTED_QUANTITY           
,ENTERPRISE_SKU_INV_ITM_ID     
,COVERED_PRD_INV_ITM_ID        
,AS_PARENT_SKU_INV_ITM_ID      
,ARCHITECTURE_ID               
,TECHNOLOGY_ID                 
,TXN_CR_PARTY_ID               
,ERP_HEADER_ID                 
,ERP_LINE_ID                   
,ERP_SO_NUMBER                 
,ORDER_NUMBER                  
,LINE_REF_NUMBER               
,BUNDLE_SALES_MOTION 
,AS_TS_FLAG                    
,BUNDLE_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID      
,BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION    
,PARENT_EXTENDED_PRICE         
,ATTRIBUTED_PERCENTAGE          
,OFFER_TYPE_ID                 
,HQ_CR_PARTY_ID
,RENEWAL_REF_TYPE
,RENEWAL_REF_VALUE
,REASON_CODE
,USER_ID
,CASE_NUMBER
,COMMENTS
,TRX_PRODUCT                   
,MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG          
,LINE_EXTENDED_PRICE           
,PART_NUMBER                   
,INSTALL_SITE_LOCATION         
,START_DATE                    
,END_DATE                      
,QUOTE_LINE_ID                 
,QUOTE_NUMBER                  
,BOOKING_TYPE                  
,CONTROL_ID                    
,CCRC_ORDER_HEADER_ID          
,DEAL_ID                       
,END_USER_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,ENT_SKU                       
,ERP_LINE_NET_PRICE                     
,LINE_COUNT                    
,MAPPED_ERP_LINE_MAP           
,OA_SERVICE_LINE               
,PBS_LINE                      
,Q2O_LINE_ID                   
,QUANTITY                      
,QUOTE_TYPE                    
,SERVICE_LEVEL                 
,SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,SMS_LINE                      
,TRANSACTION_SOURCE            
,QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,UNIT_NET_PRICE                
,ORDER_ORIGIN                   
,PID_MATCHING_VALUE            
,ORDER_BOOK_DATE               
,RECORD_OFFSET                 
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,PARTITION_NUMBER              
,TOPIC_NAME   
,OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID             
,OA_LINKED_ATTRIB_ID           
,OA_ATTRIBUTED_ITEM            
,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID          
,OA_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION        
,OA_PID_MATCHING_VALUE         
,OA_SALES_MOTION            
,ATTIBUTION_CD
,DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
,DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID
,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE
,RENEWAL_REF_RULE
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING EX
 WHERE  NOT EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING ST 
   WHERE ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID=EX.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID 
 )

SELECT 
 ST.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
,ST.TRX_ID                        
,ST.TRX_VERSION                   
,ST.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,ST.ATTRIBUTED_QUANTITY           
,ST.ENTERPRISE_SKU_INV_ITM_ID     
,ST.COVERED_PRD_INV_ITM_ID        
,ST.AS_PARENT_SKU_INV_ITM_ID      
,ST.ARCHITECTURE_ID               
,ST.TECHNOLOGY_ID                 
,ST.TXN_CR_PARTY_ID               
,ST.ERP_HEADER_ID                 
,ST.ERP_LINE_ID                   
,ST.ERP_SO_NUMBER 
,ST.ORDER_NUMBER                 
,ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER               
,ST.BUNDLE_SALES_MOTION                             
,ST.AS_TS_FLAG                    
,ST.BUNDLE_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID      
,ST.BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION    
,ST.PARENT_EXTENDED_PRICE         
,ST.ATTRIBUTED_PERCENTAGE          
,ST.OFFER_TYPE_ID                 
,ST.HQ_CR_PARTY_ID
,ST.RENEWAL_REF_TYPE
,ST.RENEWAL_REF_VALUE
,ST.REASON_CODE
,ST.USER_ID
,ST.CASE_NUMBER
,ST.COMMENTS
,ST.TRX_PRODUCT                   
,ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG          
,ST.LINE_EXTENDED_PRICE           
,ST.PART_NUMBER                   
,ST.INSTALL_SITE_LOCATION         
,ST.START_DATE                    
,ST.END_DATE                      
,ST.QUOTE_LINE_ID                 
,ST.QUOTE_NUMBER                  
,ST.BOOKING_TYPE                  
,ST.CONTROL_ID                    
,ST.CCRC_ORDER_HEADER_ID          
,ST.DEAL_ID                       
,ST.END_USER_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,ST.ENT_SKU                       
,ST.ERP_LINE_NET_PRICE                     
,ST.LINE_COUNT                    
,ST.MAPPED_ERP_LINE_MAP           
,ST.OA_SERVICE_LINE               
,ST.PBS_LINE                      
,ST.Q2O_LINE_ID                   
,ST.QUANTITY                      
,ST.QUOTE_TYPE                    
,ST.SERVICE_LEVEL                 
,ST.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_SITE_USE_ID
,ST.SMS_LINE                      
,ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE            
,ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE     
,ST.UNIT_NET_PRICE                
,ST.ORDER_ORIGIN             
,ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE            
,ST.ORDER_BOOK_DATE               
,ST.RECORD_OFFSET                 
,ST.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,ST.PARTITION_NUMBER              
,ST.TOPIC_NAME   
,ST.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID             
,ST.OA_LINKED_ATTRIB_ID           
,ST.OA_ATTRIBUTED_ITEM            
,ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID          
,ST.OA_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION        
,ST.OA_PID_MATCHING_VALUE         
,ST.OA_SALES_MOTION            
,ST.ATTIBUTION_CD 
,ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
,ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID
,ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
,ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE
,ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
 FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING ST 
 INNER JOIN 
  (
   SELECT DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
   FROM $$STGDB.ST_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING STG 
   WHERE NOT EXISTS 
   (  
    SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WI
	 WHERE WI.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  = STG.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID
	 AND WI.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID = STG.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID 
    ) 
      GROUP BY 1
	UNION
    SELECT DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID FROM $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WHERE ORDER_ORIGIN_CD='DISTI-DSV' AND BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=-999
	GROUP BY 1
        UNION
 	SELECT DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
   FROM $$STGDB.ST_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING STG 
   WHERE EXISTS 
   (  
    SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WI
	  WHERE WI.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ('AS CORE - SW Products', 'AS CORE - HW Products','AS CORE - Special')  AND COALESCE(WI.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') <> 'DISTI-DSV'
	  AND COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') NOT IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN ) 
     AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV NSOA WHERE NSOA.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
	 AND WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
	 AND STG.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID=WI.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
    ) 
      GROUP BY 1
	UNION
SELECT  DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
	FROM  $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WI WHERE ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL' ) 
	AND COALESCE(WI.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') <> 'DISTI-DSV' 
	AND COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') NOT IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN )
	AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT_HIST_TV NSOL
	WHERE NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
	AND NSOL.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
	AND NSOL.SS_CD = 'CG'
	AND (NSOL.ORDER_QTY*NSOL.UNIT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT) <> 0.0000 )
	GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(ATTR_PCT) = 0.000			
	UNION
SELECT DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
	FROM $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WI WHERE ( ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL' ) 
	OR COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN ) )
	AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT TRX
	WHERE TRX.SK_TRX_ID_INT = WI.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID
	AND TRX.RECOG_SALES_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT <> 0.0000
      AND ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <> 'DISTI-DSV' )
	GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(ATTR_PCT) = 0.000
	UNION
SELECT  DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID
	FROM   $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WI WHERE  ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'DISTI-DSV' 
	AND BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT > 0
	AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS
	WHERE NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
	AND ( VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT * POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT ) <> 0.0000 )
	GROUP BY 1 HAVING SUM(ATTR_PCT) = 0.000 
	  
  ) WK
 ON  ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID=WK.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID

SELECT
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	ST.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.PRODUCT_KEY,
	ST.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	ST.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	ST.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	ST.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.QUANTITY,                      
	ST.ATTR_PCT,
	ST.ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	ST.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	ST.AS_TS_CD,
	ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	ST.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	ST.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	ST.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	ST.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
	ST.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
	ST.SS_CD,
	ST.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	ST.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE ,
	ST.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	ST.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	ST.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	ST.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
	ST.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
	ST.DV_TRX_TYPE,
	ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
	ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
	ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
	'N' AS PROCESS_FLAG,
	'NON-CS-ERP' AS CS_SCENARIO,
	RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING ST 
  WHERE  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAG_CS_ERP CSERP
  WHERE ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID=CSERP.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID )

SELECT
                  -999 as ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
                  COALESCE(NSQL.SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,-999) AS DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
                  ST.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
                  CAST( -7777 AS INTEGER ) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
                  NPA.ITEM_KEY AS ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
            COALESCE(NPB.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
                  COALESCE(NSQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
                  COALESCE(ST.START_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT, 
                  COALESCE(ST.END_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
                  COALESCE(NPC.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
                  COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0) AS QUANTITY,
               COALESCE(NULLIF(ST.ATTRIBUTED_PERCENTAGE,0), 0 ) AS ATTR_PCT,
                  COALESCE(ST.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0000) AS ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
                  COALESCE(ST.LINE_EXTENDED_PRICE,0.0000) AS ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
                  COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_SALES_MOTION, 'UNKNOWN' ) SALES_MOTION_CD,
                  COALESCE(SITEUSE.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999 ) AS ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
                  COALESCE(ST.AS_TS_FLAG,'UNK') AS AS_TS_CD,
                  COALESCE( ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER,-999 ) AS SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
                  COALESCE( ARCH.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
                  COALESCE( TECH.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
                  COALESCE( OFFER.NAME,'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                  COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999) AS TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
                  COALESCE(ST.TRX_ID,-999) AS SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
                  COALESCE(NULLIF(ST.AS_PARENT_SKU_INV_ITM_ID,0),-999) AS SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
                  COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
                  COALESCE(ST.TRX_VERSION,-999) AS ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
                  ST.CONTROL_ID AS SK_CONTROL_ID_INT, 
                  ST.LINE_COUNT AS SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
      'RTE' AS SS_CD,
      COALESCE(ST.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999) AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
                  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
      USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
                  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
      USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS START_TV_DTM, 
      '3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS END_TV_DTM, 
      COALESCE(ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS PID_MATCHING_VALUE,
      COALESCE(NPHQ.PARTY_KEY,-999) AS HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
                  ST.RENEWAL_REF_VALUE AS RENEWAL_REF_ID,
                  ST.RENEWAL_REF_TYPE AS RENEWAL_REF_CD,
                  ST.REASON_CODE AS SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
                  'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
      COALESCE(ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG,'N') AS MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,    
      COALESCE(NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,                   
      ST.CASE_NUMBER AS SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,                   
      ST.COMMENTS AS SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
      COALESCE(ST.ATTIBUTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS  ATTIBUTION_CD,
      COALESCE(ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, -999) as BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
      COALESCE(ST.ORDER_ORIGIN, 'UNKNOWN') as ORDER_ORIGIN, 
      ST.ORDER_NUMBER AS DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,   
      'XAAS' AS DV_TRX_TYPE,   
      COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0) AS QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
      ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
      ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
      ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	  ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
    FROM ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WHERE ( BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') 
	OR COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN ) )
	AND COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') <> 'DISTI-DSV'
			) ST 
             INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLSTRX_NRT TRX
           ON ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID = TRX.SK_TRX_ID_INT
           AND COALESCE(TRX.TRX_SS_CD, 'UNKNOWN' ) <> 'AR' /* Added filter as part of Nov 2020 SW release to restrict AR XAAS lines from OPL and inherit within EDW */
              LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE NSQL
              ON COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') = NSQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM
              AND COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(NSQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_ID_INT,-999)
             LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPC
              ON COALESCE(ST.COVERED_PRD_INV_ITM_ID,-1012624) = NPC.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
             INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPA
              ON ST.ENTERPRISE_SKU_INV_ITM_ID = NPA.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
             LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPB
              ON COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,-1012624) = NPB.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
    LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE SITEUSE
              ON CAST(COALESCE(ST.INSTALL_SITE_LOCATION,-999)as BIGINT) = SITEUSE.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
             LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
              ON COALESCE(ST.TXN_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
             AND NP.SS_CODE IN ('CR_MODS','CR')
    AND COALESCE(NP.STATUS_CODE,'A')='A'
              LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPHQ
              ON COALESCE(ST.HQ_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) = NPHQ.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
               AND NPHQ.SS_CODE IN ('CR_MODS','CR')
             AND COALESCE(NPHQ.STATUS_CODE,'A')='A'
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_ARCH ARCH
    ON ST.ARCHITECTURE_ID = ARCH.ARCHITECTURE_ID
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_TECH TECH
    ON ST.TECHNOLOGY_ID = TECH.TECHNOLOGY_ID
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_BIZ_SERVICES OFFER
    ON ST.OFFER_TYPE_ID = OFFER.BS_ID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
    ON NCWP.CEC_ID||'@cisco.com'=ST.USER_ID
    AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'

SELECT
                 -999 as ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
                 COALESCE(NSQL.SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,-999) AS DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
                 ST.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
                 CAST( -7777 AS INTEGER ) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
                 NPA.ITEM_KEY AS ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
		         COALESCE(NPB.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
                 COALESCE(NSQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM,'UNKNOWN')  AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
                 COALESCE(ST.START_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT, 
                 COALESCE(ST.END_DATE, CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
                 COALESCE(NPC.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
                 COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0) AS QUANTITY,
            	 COALESCE(NULLIF(ST.ATTRIBUTED_PERCENTAGE,0), 0 ) AS ATTR_PCT,
                 COALESCE(ST.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0000) AS ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
                 COALESCE(ST.LINE_EXTENDED_PRICE,0.0000) AS ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
                 COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_SALES_MOTION, 'UNKNOWN' ) SALES_MOTION_CD,
                 COALESCE(SITEUSE.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999 ) AS ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
                 COALESCE(ST.AS_TS_FLAG,'UNK') AS AS_TS_CD,
                 COALESCE( ST.LINE_REF_NUMBER,-999 ) AS SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
                 COALESCE( ARCH.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
                 COALESCE( TECH.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
                 COALESCE( OFFER.NAME,'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                 COALESCE(NP.PARTY_KEY,-999) AS TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
                 COALESCE(ST.TRX_ID,-999) AS SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
                 COALESCE(NULLIF(ST.AS_PARENT_SKU_INV_ITM_ID,0),-999) AS SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
                 COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_ITEM_CATEGORIZATION,'UNKNOWN') AS ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
                 COALESCE(ST.TRX_VERSION,-999) AS ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
                 ST.CONTROL_ID AS SK_CONTROL_ID_INT, 
                 ST.LINE_COUNT AS SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
				 'RTE' AS SS_CD,
				 COALESCE(ST.OA_ATTRIBUTION_ID,-9999) AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
                 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
				 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
                 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
				 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
				 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS START_TV_DTM, 
				 '3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS END_TV_DTM, 
				 COALESCE(ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS PID_MATCHING_VALUE,
				 COALESCE(NPHQ.PARTY_KEY,-999) AS HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
                 ST.RENEWAL_REF_VALUE AS RENEWAL_REF_ID,
                 ST.RENEWAL_REF_TYPE AS RENEWAL_REF_CD,
                 ST.REASON_CODE AS SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
                 'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
				 COALESCE(ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_FLAG,'N') AS MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,    
				 COALESCE(NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,                   
				 ST.CASE_NUMBER AS SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,                   
				 ST.COMMENTS AS SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
				 COALESCE(ST.ATTIBUTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS  ATTIBUTION_CD,
				 COALESCE(ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, -999) as BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
				 COALESCE(ST.ORDER_ORIGIN, 'UNKNOWN') as ORDER_ORIGIN, 
				 ST.ORDER_NUMBER AS DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,   
				'POS'	AS DV_TRX_TYPE,			
				 COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0.0) AS QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
				 ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
				 ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
				 ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
				 ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
			FROM ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_OPL_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING WHERE ORDER_ORIGIN='DISTI-DSV' AND BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT > 0) ST 
			INNER JOIN ( SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, PRODUCT_KEY 
			FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE  ) POS_TRX
			ON POS_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT			
             LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE NSQL
             ON COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') = NSQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM
             AND COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_ID,-999) = COALESCE(NSQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_ID_INT,-999)
            LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPC
             ON COALESCE(ST.COVERED_PRD_INV_ITM_ID,-1012624) = NPC.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
            INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPA
             ON ST.ENTERPRISE_SKU_INV_ITM_ID = NPA.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
            LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPB
             ON COALESCE(ST.BUNDLE_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,-1012624) = NPB.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT 
			LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE SITEUSE
             ON CAST(COALESCE(ST.INSTALL_SITE_LOCATION,-999)as BIGINT) = SITEUSE.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT
            LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
             ON COALESCE(ST.TXN_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
            AND NP.SS_CODE IN ('CR_MODS','CR')
			AND COALESCE(NP.STATUS_CODE,'A')='A'
             LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPHQ
             ON COALESCE(ST.HQ_CR_PARTY_ID,-999) = NPHQ.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
              AND NPHQ.SS_CODE IN ('CR_MODS','CR')
            AND COALESCE(NPHQ.STATUS_CODE,'A')='A'
			LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_ARCH ARCH
			ON ST.ARCHITECTURE_ID = ARCH.ARCHITECTURE_ID
			LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_TECH TECH
			ON ST.TECHNOLOGY_ID = TECH.TECHNOLOGY_ID
			LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCAS_SLIMCS_BIZ_SERVICES OFFER
			ON ST.OFFER_TYPE_ID = OFFER.BS_ID
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
			ON NCWP.CEC_ID||'@cisco.com'=ST.USER_ID
			AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
